title: Xiaomi Portable Electric Air Compressor 2 Pro
body:
I was thinking about getting this with the AliExpress sales and cashbacks.
https://www.mi.com/au/product/xiaomi-portable-electric-air-c…
But I can't seem to get any discount codes to work, plus it adds tax to the order
I can sort of workout a AU$87.25 + $10 tax plus 20% cashback (~$17.45) = $79.8 total after cashback.
Can anyone work out the right seller to actually get a good discount?
it's $87.55 shipped locally.
https://www.pbtech.com/au/product/TOLMIX9099/Xiaomi-Mi-Home-…
